# Snapshot Source Notes: valid_m8b_small

This is a **synthetic test fixture** for M8-B snapshot validator/loader
testing. It is NOT real NBA data, NOT real player names, NOT real
salaries, and NOT real contracts.

- snapshot_id: valid_m8b_small
- snapshot_type: test_fixture
- source_name: m8b_test_fixture
- as_of_date: 2026-07-01

All team IDs, player IDs, contract IDs, and salary figures are
fictional. Do not use this data as a source of real NBA information.
